overallAssessment: The agent successfully modeled the general REST/HTTPS structure for most components, which is acceptable where no specific protocol contract exists. However, three critical areas—AI Processing, Offline Synchronization, and Security/Identity Management—show HIGH severity protocol mismatches. In these cases, the agent defaulted to generic REST/HTTPS when the governing Interface Contracts explicitly mandate specialized protocols (gRPC, TUS, KMS API), leading to a failure to align the API definitions with the required technical implementation layer.
